results.rendered_html:
māyāvin (von māyā)
1〉 adj.  P. 5,2,121 .  VOP. 7,29 . zauberkräftig; Trug anwendend, Andere täuschend, — hintergehend; von Personen  HALĀY. 2,194 . vṛtra  ṚV. 2,11,9 . 9,83,3 . die Aśvin 10,24,4 .  MBH. 3,11683 . 13366 . 5,1224 . 13,1214  (Śiva). 2289 (Indra).  R. 1,1,51 . 3,49,47 . 4,8,36  ( GORR.  als N. pr.). 9,10 . 6,7,5 . 19,64 .  RAGH. 10,46 .  Spr. 257 .  KIR. 1,30 .  MĀRK. P. 22,7 .  PAÑCAT. ed. orn. 56,2 . puruṣottama  WILSON, Sel. Works 1,243 . in Täuschung bestehend, ein Blendwerk bildend: brahma  NĪLAK. 158 . m. Zauberer, Gaukler, Taschenspieler: naṭāśca nartakāścaiva mallā māyāvinastathā . śobhayeyuḥ puravaraṃ modayeyuśca sarvaśaḥ ..  MBH. 12,2655 .  BHĀG. P. 5,24,16 .  KUSUM. 23,7 .
— 2〉 m. Katze  RĀJAN. _im_ ŚKDR.

results.rendered_html:
māyāvin a. [māyā-astyarthe vini]
1 Using deceit or tricks, employing stratagems, deceitful, fraudulent; vrajaṃti te mūḍhadhiyaḥ parābhavaṃ bhavaṃti māyāviṣu ye na māyinaḥ  Ki. 1. 30 ;  R. 10. 45. 
2 Skilled in magic.
3 Unreal, illusory.
— m.
1 A magician, conjurer.
2 A cat.
— n. A gall-nut.
